title: Gooey Golden Australian Cheese Lasagna
description: A rich and comforting Australian dish featuring a blend of cheeses, apple juice, and tempering spices, perfect for a hangover cure, this ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly recipe is sure to satisfy, with a bitter and cheese-pull texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the apple juice and tempering spices to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, and mozzarella cheese.
Stir in the salt, black pepper, and chopped parsley.
Spread a layer of the cheese mixture in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Pour the apple juice mixture over the top layer of cheese.
